ideation: This sequence simulates the act of someone excitedly holding up a wedge of cheese, perhaps after having just tasted it and discovered its deliciousness. The animation will start with both arms at rest, then transition to holding the cheese wedge (simulated by positioning the hands as if cradling a small object), and finally end with a slight upward motion to emphasize the enjoyment. The movement will be fluid but not overly exaggerated, reflecting the casual nature of the emoji. In the first frame, both arms are relaxed by the side. In the second frame, both arms move upward to cradle the imaginary cheese wedge. The arms move slightly outward and upward, and the hands are positioned as if holding a small object. In the third frame, the arms move slightly higher, emphasizing the delightful discovery of the cheese. In the fourth frame, both arms drop back down to a resting position, maintaining a slight upward angle, as if lingering on the cheese's flavor, and in the fifth frame, both arms return to a completely neutral position.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, ready for a snack
arms lift to cradle the imaginary cheese
holding the cheese up, a delightful discovery
arms lower slightly, savoring the taste
arms return to rest, the cheese is gone
